title: Door-to-Door Sales Workers, News and Street Vendors, and Related Workers
description: Sell goods or services door-to-door or on the street.

tasks.text: Explain products or services and prices and demonstrate use of products.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.
Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Write and record orders for merchandise or enter orders into computers.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Arrange buying parties and solicit sponsorship of such parties to sell merchandise.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Answer questions about product features and benefits.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Distribute product samples or literature that details products or services.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Circulate among potential customers or travel by foot, truck, automobile, or bicycle to deliver or sell merchandise or services.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Persuade customers to purchase merchandise or services.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Set up and display sample merchandise at parties or stands.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
